note: WDLL 51. Main commercial and light-industrial scalar rows transcribed from official Ordinance 2024-18, Appendix II, at https://mcclibraryfunctions-stage.azurewebsites.us/api/ordinanceDownload/11173/1309249/pdf (accessed 2026-07-23). side_corner_ft mirrors base side only as a non-binding sentinel; the appendix does not give a separate corner-side field. OMITTED: RLD/RMD/RHD because their development-type table does not select one scalar row from the GIS zone alone; CCB because its central-business setbacks vary by alley/end condition; IH because its line uses variable building-setback triggers; MH corner and adjacent-lot rules; AO, PI, PDD, and all two-story-adjacency, drive-through, and block-average exceptions in notes 5, 6, and 10.
